$comment: Declares which Hugging Face model revisions and ONNX Runtime Web version get mirrored to Cloudflare R2 (SPEC.md §6, §6.1). The .onnx binaries themselves are never committed to this repo — scripts/upload-model-weights.ts reads this file and syncs the real files to R2. Revisions are pinned to immutable commit SHAs (not "main") so the R2 path is content-hashed by construction.

onnxRuntimeWeb.$comment: Version must match the onnxruntime-web dependency in package.json. scripts/upload-model-weights.ts mirrors that installed package's entire dist/ folder — which exact file the runtime picks (simd-threaded / asyncify / jsep / jspi) depends on per-browser feature detection, so no fixed subset is safe to hardcode here.
